title: Crispy Korean-Style Fried Mulukhiyah Bites
description: A twist on traditional mulukhiyah, these crispy bites are perfect as a snack or appetizer. The combination of crunchy xtra and crisp vegetables with the savory flavor of jeon and mulukhiyah is a game-changer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mulukhiyah leaves, xtra, and crisp kimchi.
Add jeon and flour to the bowl and mix well.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mulukhiyah mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the mulukhiyah bites for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fried bites on paper towels and serve hot.
